Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: First I need to create a BPMN like textual model from these interviews First I should start with the core elements roles first right Lets list all the participants first that makes sense Then for each part separate the standard happy path gateways exceptions artifacts etc

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets start with Participants Roles Lets list each one with their responsibility in the process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Next Artifacts Inputs Outputs Lets list those first

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now the main process flow First start event Invoice Received from Supplier via email First task is the AP Clerks initial validation Check Invoice for Valid PO Number Thats the first gateway right Because two paths here if no valid PO vs has valid PO

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Wait lets map the happy path first then exceptions Lets structure it step by step with sequence flow gateways roles for each step

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then Gateway 1 YES path AP Clerk Log Invoice into Accounting System Thats the next task Then next task AP Clerk Forward Invoice to Purchasing for Goods Services Receipt Confirmation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then Dan does his check Purchasing Officer Validate Invoice Alignment with PO and Receipt Confirmation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Gateway 2 NO path first Purchasing Officer AP Clerk Attempt to Resolve Discrepancy Then Gateway 3 Discrepancy Resolvable at Operational Level

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If NO AP Clerk Escalate Exception to AP Supervisor Then AP Supervisor plus Supplier Relationship Manager Resolve High Severity Exception

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Gateway 2 YES Purchasing Officer Send Receipt and Alignment Confirmation to AP Clerk Then next task Accounting System Trigger Automatic Approval Request to Department Manager Then Department Manager Review Invoice PO and Purchasing Confirmation Then Gateway 4 Manager Approval Granted

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: If NO Department Manager Reject or Flag Invoice for Investigation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If YES AP Clerk Schedule Invoice for Payment Run Then End Event Invoice Approved for Payment added to next payment cycle

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait also lets check for ambiguities For example after a discrepancy is resolved at the operational level do they go back to Purchasing confirmation or straight to manager approval

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Mary said if discrepancy email purchasing to clarify once resolved then manager approval Dan said if everything is correct send confirmation to AP then AP moves to manager So if discrepancy is resolved then Purchasing sends the confirmation right

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Lets structure the output properly First maybe a preamble with core metadata then Participants Roles then Artifacts then the Process Flow structured as a textual BPMN with start and end events tasks gateways sequence flows end events then exceptions as alternate paths

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Exception Path A Missing Invalid PO triggered at Gateway 1 Send Request for Missing Valid PO to Supplier Wait for Supplier to Submit Revised Invoice with Valid PO Re enter Standard Process Flow at PO Validation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Exception Path B Invoice PO Discrepancy triggered at Gateway 2 Attempt Operational Level Discrepancy Resolution contact supplier for corrected invoice clarify line item details Route based on resolvability of discrepancy

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Exception Path C Manager Rejection Flag triggered at Gateway 3 Reject Invoice or Flag for Further Investigation notify AP Clerk of issue AP Clerk and Purchasing Officer Investigate Flagged Issue Coordinate with Relevant Stakeholders

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Exception Path D High Severity Non Standard Exception triggered at Gateway 4 Escalate Exception to AP Supervisor Resolve Exception liaise with supplier for corrected invoice or PO details verify contract terms for pricing discrepancies coordinate with department heads to create retrospective PO for informal service invoices decide if invoice should be rejected

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets make sure that all interview points are covered

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait wait hold on Mary said After logging it I forward it to the purchasing department to confirm that the goods or services were actually received Once I get confirmation I match the invoice line items against the PO in the system If everything matches I then send it to the department manager for approval Oh I missed that step

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Lets correct that Lets rework Steps 5 to 10

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 4 AP Clerk Log Invoice into Accounting System Step 5 AP Clerk Forward Logged Invoice to Purchasing for Goods Services Receipt Confirmation Step 6 Purchasing Officer Validate Goods Services Receipt and Provide Confirmation to AP Clerk Step 7 AP Clerk Perform 3 Way Match Invoice vs PO vs Receipt Confirmation in Accounting System Step 8 Exclusive Gateway Invoice 3 Way Match Result Valid

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thats a better flow because it captures both Marys matching step and Dans initial validation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets also make sure that all interview points are included Great all points are included
